# Stamped Energy

> Prescriptive energy intelligence software for Indian manufacturers. Stamped Energy connects existing incomer meters, SCADA, PLCs, and DISCOM electricity bills into rupee-denominated prescriptions — ranked actions with owners, effort, and verified savings on the next bill. Typical outcomes: 12–20% monthly bill reduction; 15–25% maximum demand charge reduction. Built by IIT Roorkee electrical engineers for auto component suppliers (die casting, forging, heat treatment, rubber moulding).

Public marketing site: https://stamped.work
Contact: contact@stamped.work
Sitemap: https://stamped.work/sitemap.xml

## Core pages

- [Home](https://stamped.work/): Product overview, outcomes, five-step energy loop, FAQ schema
- [How It Works](https://stamped.work/how-it-works): Connect → Observe → Decide → Execute → Verify workflow; HowTo schema
- [Industries — Automotive](https://stamped.work/industries/automotive): Die casting, forging, heat treatment, rubber moulding energy cost reduction
- [Industries hub](https://stamped.work/industries): Industry verticals
- [Case Studies](https://stamped.work/case-studies): Verified savings outcomes from real plants
- [About](https://stamped.work/about): Founders, IIT Roorkee background, mission
- [Contact](https://stamped.work/contact): Book a discovery call

## Blog — field notes for plant heads

- [Blog index](https://stamped.work/blog): Maximum demand, shift-start overlap, furnace holding, compressor waste
- Individual articles at `https://stamped.work/blog/{slug}` — Article JSON-LD on each post

## Priority keywords

stamped energy, prescriptive energy intelligence India, energy management software for manufacturers India, reduce electricity bill manufacturing India, maximum demand reduction India, energy cost reduction auto component manufacturers, DISCOM bill savings India, SEC reduction manufacturing India

## Target audience

Plant heads, electrical HODs, and CFOs at Indian manufacturing SMEs (₹10Cr–₹1000Cr revenue), especially auto component suppliers.

## What Stamped Energy is not

Not a passive EMS dashboard or SCADA replacement. It is a prescription and accountability layer: what to change, who owns it, rupee impact, verified on the DISCOM bill.

## Crawling

All public pages are open to search and AI crawlers. Admin CMS (`/blog/admin`), API routes (`/api/`), and build assets (`/_next/`) are disallowed in robots.txt.
